mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Estate of William M. Slaughter
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Estate of William M. Slaughter Sabra Slaughter, Widow J.R. Slaughter, Son E.J. Levings, Daughter L.E. Matheney, Daughter Paris A. Slaughter, Child Ozena A. Slaughter, Child Henry A. Slaughter, Son Gerdie M. Slaughter, Daughter Zebrem Keith, Administrator de bonis non Recorded in Ledger Book 5, page 114, in the Floyd County Courthouse.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
